name: eastern cultivation ink fantasy
description: Chinese xianxia cultivation fantasy blending refined gongbi detail with ink-wash atmosphere, readable top-down action silhouettes, jade talismans, flying swords, spirit fire, cloud seas, ancient sect architecture, and celestial tribulation effects.
view: top-down 3/4 arcade action with wide landscape cinematic key art
outline: dark ink contour with restrained gold accents
lighting: moonlit mist, jade spirit glow, cinnabar fire, high readability
